summary: There is no available evidence supporting any specific light transmission percentage for light transmitting wedges; while some optical materials like filters have defined transmission rates, these do not apply directly to wedges due to differing physical properties and functions. Therefore, claiming a value such as 90-95% lacks basis in the provided information.
